授業目的: Canada through Short Film and Literature introduces students to a multiplicity of lives and experiences in Canada. Topics treated may include: wilderness and urban life, immigration and multiculturalism, gender dynamics, and Canada on the world stage. Students will help decide what texts we treat in class. Students who wish to improve their English are very welcome.
到達目標: Students will have familiarized themselves with some of the important elements of Canadian culture.  Students will have improved their critical reading, viewing and thinking skills. Students will have increased their capacity for active learning. Students will have practiced task-based, group learning and presentation skills. Students will have improved their English reading, writing, and speaking skills.
授業方法: Face-to-Face (12 sessions) This course will combine Lecture, Seminar, Discussion, Presentation format

第1回:
